title: Inventory cyclone data sources for Bay of Bengal
outcome: A dated source inventory separating cyclone track data, storm surge models, population data, shelter data, and unusable sources.
expected_artifact: datasets.md update plus evidence.json records for each accepted source.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each listed source for URL, date, access status, license, geographic grain, and limitations.
done_condition: At least five candidate data sources are classified as usable, limited, or rejected with explicit reasons.

title: Verify cyclone track forecast accuracy by lead time
outcome: A track forecast verification report with error distances, intensity errors, and landfall timing errors at 24, 48, and 72-hour lead times for all Bay of Bengal cyclones since 2010.
expected_artifact: validation.md update with track error statistics by lead time.
validation_method: Replicator reruns track error calculations against withheld cyclones and confirms error statistics within reported tolerance.
done_condition: Track errors include mean and 95th percentile distance errors and intensity errors at 24, 48, and 72 hours with replication confirmed.

title: Verify storm surge model accuracy at coastal district scale
outcome: A storm surge model verification report comparing model predictions to tide gauge observations and post-event survey data for major cyclones.
expected_artifact: validation.md update with surge error statistics by district.
validation_method: Replicator reruns surge model validation against independent tide gauge records and confirms error bounds.
done_condition: Surge verification includes mean error, maximum error, and bias for each coastal district with replication confirmed.

title: Profile false-alarm rates at evacuation-relevant lead times
outcome: A false-alarm profile showing hit rate, false-alarm rate, and missed-event rate for candidate evacuation signal thresholds at 24, 48, and 72-hour lead times for each coastal district.
expected_artifact: outputs.md update with false-alarm profile table.
validation_method: Replicator reruns false-alarm calculation on independent cyclone dataset and confirms rates within reported tolerance.
done_condition: Every candidate signal includes a false-alarm rate, hit rate, and missed-event rate at each lead time with replication confirmed.

title: Red-team false-confidence evacuation signals
outcome: A failure-mode review identifying how false-alarm profiles could be misinterpreted, how evacuation thresholds could fail, and who would be harmed by false confidence.
expected_artifact: outputs.md and SAFETY.md linked review note.
validation_method: Reviewer confirms every high-risk failure mode has a mitigation or blocks publication, then a second reviewer replicates the failure-mode check.
done_condition: Every evacuation signal claim is either blocked, softened to verification language, or gated behind field-reality review and replicated red-team review.

title: Check whether verification outputs match CPP decision needs
outcome: A field-facing review of whether track and surge verification outputs would change any real CPP warning decision responsibly.
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with use and non-use guidance.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies the actual decision, user, timing, and misuse risk for the output, then a second reviewer replicates the non-use-case check.
done_condition: The output has a named user, named decision, explicit non-use cases, and replicated field-reality review before publication.
